locations.name: 普洛格山
locations.summary: 普洛格山（菲律賓語：Bundok Pulag，伊洛卡諾語：Bantay Pulag）是菲律賓的山峰，位於該國北部呂宋島，海拔高度2,922米，山上有528種植物和33種鳥類，每年平均降雨量4,489毫米，該山峰大部分地區自1987年2月2…

relations.subject: Luzon water redstart
relations.evidence: Adjacent habitat includes tropical montane forest, pine forest or just scrub and scattered trees
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Luzon water redstart
relations.evidence: It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Luzon water redstart
relations.evidence: Its main threat is habitat degradation caused by pollution of its streams through mining and dumping of trash and agro-chemicals
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
